message:
fix: hardcoded constants, dynamic config, stream RDB, version consistency

Hardcoded constants → dynamic:
- INFO hz/configured_hz now reads from store.server_hz (synced on CONFIG SET)
- INFO maxclients now reads from store.server_maxclients
- INFO executable uses std::env::current_exe() instead of hardcoded path
- CLIENT LIST laddr port uses actual server_port
- Server bind address: add --bind flag, default 127.0.0.1 (was 0.0.0.0)

Version consistency:
- RDB aux redis-ver: 7.0.0 → 7.2.0 (matches INFO and HELLO)

Stream RDB persistence (was silently dropping streams):
- Add RdbValue::Stream variant with encode/decode support
- Streams now round-trip through SAVE/BGSAVE → RDB load
- Watermark (last-generated-id) preserved across save/restore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
